hero.headline: Your Home, Professionally Clean.
hero.subheadline: El Paso's trusted residential and commercial cleaning service. We show up, we clean right, you come home to perfect.

whyUs.label: WHY CHOOSE US
whyUs.headline: The Comfy Clean Difference
whyUs.card1_desc: Based in Far East El Paso. We know the community because we're part of it.
whyUs.card2_desc: We show up when we say we will. No surprises, no excuses.
whyUs.card3_desc: From family homes to offices, we clean it all right the first time.
whyUs.card4_desc: English and Spanish. We communicate clearly, always.

services.label: WHAT WE OFFER
services.headline: Our Cleaning Services
services.residential_desc: Deep clean, standard clean, move-in/out cleaning tailored to your home.
services.commercial_desc: Offices, retail, small commercial spaces — cleaned right every time.
services.recurring_desc: Weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly schedules available for consistent cleanliness.

serviceArea.label: WHERE WE SERVE
serviceArea.headline: Serving Far East El Paso
serviceArea.desc: We proudly serve Far East El Paso including Horizon City, Socorro, and surrounding communities.

cta.headline: Ready for a Cleaner Space?
cta.desc: Book your free visit today. No obligation, no pressure — just a clean home.

book.label: GET STARTED
book.headline: Request Your Free Visit
book.name: Full Name
book.success: Thank you! We received your request and will call you within 24 hours to confirm your visit.
book.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

about.label: OUR STORY
about.headline: About Comfy Clean Co.
about.p1: Comfy Clean Co. is a locally owned residential and commercial cleaning company rooted in the Far East El Paso community. We started because we believe every home and business deserves a truly clean space — and that the people providing that service should be trustworthy, reliable, and local.
about.p2: We serve busy professional families and businesses throughout Far East El Paso, Horizon City, Socorro, and the surrounding areas. Our team is bilingual, professional, and committed to showing up on time and cleaning right the first time.
about.p3: We're not a franchise. We're your neighbors.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.headline: Contact Comfy Clean Co.
contact.location_value: Far East El Paso, Horizon City, Socorro, TX
